theme: cook a banquet with four burners and no fridge
title: No-Fridge Banquet: Minimal Re-Prep Under a Burner Cap
strategies: rebuild every dish from raw ingredients for every plating call, 2 burners only (trivial)
textbook uniform sqrt-spaced checkpoint burners, blind to the cost array (greedy)
DP-chosen checkpoint burners that read the planted cost landscape and land on cheap regenerator steps (strong)
fully adaptive cross-call caching / recursive nested checkpointing (open ceiling, uncovered)
